english translation text: SALAAMS ON THE HEAD OF MY MAWLA HUSAYNSALAAMS ON THE LIPS OF MY BLESSED HUSAYNFOR DAYS IN THE DESERT YOUR BODY REMAINEDWITH THOUSANDS OF ARROWS YOUR SHROUD THEY BECAME

urdu transliteration text: Hussain Al Ghareeb / Hussain The Lonely One.
english translation text: AND ON ARBAEEN WHEN THE MILLIONS WILL PRAYTHE GRIEF AND THE MOURNING FOR YOU YA HUSAYN

english translation text: THE SCREAMS OF THE CHILDREN THIRSTY FOR WATERTHE DUTY WAS SENT TO ABBAS OUR SAVIOURTHE LION OF GOD COULD BE SEEN RIDING FASTERTO REACH AL FURAT AND TO PLEASE HIS SAKINA

urdu transliteration text: Hussain Al Ghareeb / Hussain The Lonely One.
english translation text: BUT HOW DOES HE FALL FROM THE HORSE WITH NO HANDSTHE FLAG OF ISLAM LAYING BARE ON THE SAND

english translation text: A LADY WAS SEEN PEERING OUT FROM THE TENTSA CRY FROM THE HEAVENS THAT ZAHRA PRESENTSOH SHIMR OH SHIMR WHY ON HIS CHESTTHE SWORD STAINED IN BLOOD WAS HUSAYN’S FINAL TEST

urdu transliteration text: Hussain Al Ghareeb / Hussain The Lonely One.
english translation text: HUSAYN TO YOUR MOTHER ITS TIME TO ASCENDYOUR TRIALS IN KERBALA HAVE COME TO AN END

english translation text: SAKINA WOULD CRY EVERY NIGHT FOR HER FATHERAND ZAINAB WOULD CRADLE HUSAYN’S LITTLE DAUGHTERBUT WHEN THEY PRESENTED HIS HEAD ON A PLATTERSAKINA COULD NOT BEAR TO LIVE ANY LONGER

urdu transliteration text: Hussain Al Ghareeb / Hussain The Lonely One.
english translation text: BUT NO ONE COULD COMFORT OR SOOTHE YOUNG SAKINASHE DIED IN THE PRISON WITH ZAINAB BESIDE HER

english translation text: THE FIRE THE BURNING THE TENTS UP IN FLAMESOH ZAINAB PROTECT IMAM ALI BIN HUSAYNTHE SOLDIERS OF YAZEED WANT TO BEAT US WITH CHAINSTHE WOMEN AND CHIDLREN ARE CYRING IN VAIN

urdu transliteration text: Hussain Al Ghareeb / Hussain The Lonely One.
english translation text: OH BABA ALI PLEASE COME BACK AND DEFEND USYOUR CHILDREN ARE WAITING FOR YOU TO RETURN
